subscription.title: My Plan
subscription.description: Manage your subscription and review your current usage

grandfathered.title: Founders Plan
grandfathered.description: Thank you for being one of ProfeVision's first users! Your invaluable support helps us turn a dream into a service that will help teachers take back control of their time and save them tedious hours grading exams manually. For now, you can use all features without limits. For any questions, requests, or suggestions, write to us at founders@profevision.com

usage.title: Current Usage
usage.freeDescription: Your monthly usage limits reset automatically each month

q1.question: What happens if I reach my monthly limit?
q1.answer: If you reach your monthly limit, you won't be able to use that feature until your cycle renews. You can upgrade to Plus to get unlimited access.

q2.question: When does my monthly limit renew?
q2.answer: Your limit renews automatically every month on your billing cycle start date.

q3.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
q3.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You will maintain access to premium features until the end of your current billing period.

pricing.comingSoonDesc: Payment functionality will be available soon. Stay tuned!
